test_patch:
diff --git a/cmd/flipt/bundle_test.go b/cmd/flipt/bundle_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..8d2911f3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/cmd/flipt/bundle_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,179 @@
+package main
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"encoding/json"
+	"fmt"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+
+	v1 "github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/specs-go/v1"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/oci"
+)
+
+func TestBundleCommand_Build_DefaultManifestVersion(t *testing.T) {
+	manifest, err := buildBundleManifest(t, "")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	assert.NotContains(t, manifest, "artifactType")
+
+	config, ok := manifest["config"].(map[string]any)
+	require.True(t, ok)
+	assert.Equal(t, oci.MediaTypeFliptFeatures, config["mediaType"])
+}
+
+func TestBundleCommand_Build_ExplicitManifestVersion10(t *testing.T) {
+	manifest, err := buildBundleManifest(t, `manifest_version: "oci-1.0"`)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	assert.NotContains(t, manifest, "artifactType")
+
+	config, ok := manifest["config"].(map[string]any)
+	require.True(t, ok)
+	assert.Equal(t, oci.MediaTypeFliptFeatures, config["mediaType"])
+}
+
+func TestBundleCommand_Build_ExplicitManifestVersion11(t *testing.T) {
+	defaultManifest, err := buildBundleManifest(t, "")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	manifest, err := buildBundleManifest(t, `manifest_version: "oci-1.1"`)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	_, defaultHasArtifactType := defaultManifest["artifactType"]
+	assert.False(t, defaultHasArtifactType)
+	assert.Equal(t, oci.MediaTypeFliptFeatures, manifest["artifactType"])
+}
+
+func TestBundleCommand_Build_UnsupportedManifestVersion(t *testing.T) {
+	_, configPath, restore := prepareBundleBuild(t, `manifest_version: "1.2"`)
+	defer restore()
+
+	result, err := config.Load(configPath)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NotNil(t, result)
+	require.NotNil(t, result.Config)
+	require.NotNil(t, result.Config.Storage.OCI)
+	assert.Equal(t, "1.2", result.Config.Storage.OCI.ManifestVersion)
+
+	command := newBundleCommand()
+	command.SetContext(context.Background())
+
+	err = (&bundleCommand{}).build(command, []string{"bundle-test:latest"})
+	require.Error(t, err)
+	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "manifest version")
+}
+
+func TestBundleCommand_Build_UnsupportedCanonicalLookingManifestVersion(t *testing.T) {
+	for _, manifestVersion := range []string{"1.0", "1.1", "v1.0", "v1.1"} {
+		t.Run(manifestVersion, func(t *testing.T) {
+			manifest, err := buildBundleManifest(t, fmt.Sprintf(`manifest_version: %q`, manifestVersion))
+
+			require.Error(t, err)
+			assert.Nil(t, manifest)
+			assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "manifest version")
+		})
+	}
+}
+
+func buildBundleManifest(t *testing.T, manifestVersion string) (map[string]any, error) {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	bundlesDir, _, restore := prepareBundleBuild(t, manifestVersion)
+	defer restore()
+
+	command := newBundleCommand()
+	command.SetContext(context.Background())
+
+	if err := (&bundleCommand{}).build(command, []string{"bundle-test:latest"}); err != nil {
+		return nil, err
+	}
+
+	return readBundleManifestJSON(t, bundlesDir, "bundle-test", "latest"), nil
+}
+
+func prepareBundleBuild(t *testing.T, manifestVersion string) (string, string, func()) {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	previousConfigFile := providedConfigFile
+	previousWorkingDirectory, err := os.Getwd()
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	workdir := t.TempDir()
+	bundlesDir := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "bundles")
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(workdir, ".flipt.yml"), []byte(`version: 1.0
+include:
+  - default.yml
+  - production.yml
+`), 0600))
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(workdir, "default.yml"), []byte(`flags:
+- key: flag_boolean
+  name: FLAG_BOOLEAN
+  type: BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE
+  description: Boolean Flag Description
+  enabled: false
+`), 0600))
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(workdir, "production.yml"), []byte(`namespace: production
+flags:
+- key: flag_boolean
+  name: FLAG_BOOLEAN
+  type: BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE
+  description: Boolean Flag Description
+  enabled: false
+`), 0600))
+
+	configContents := `storage:
+  type: oci
+  oci:
+    repository: remote/example:latest
+    bundles_directory: ` + bundlesDir + "\n"
+	if manifestVersion != "" {
+		configContents += "    " + manifestVersion + "\n"
+	}
+
+	configPath := filepath.Join(workdir, "config.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configPath, []byte(configContents), 0600))
+
+	providedConfigFile = configPath
+	require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(workdir))
+
+	restore := func() {
+		providedConfigFile = previousConfigFile
+		require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(previousWorkingDirectory))
+	}
+
+	return bundlesDir, configPath, restore
+}
+
+func readBundleManifestJSON(t *testing.T, bundlesDir, repository, tag string) map[string]any {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	indexPath := filepath.Join(bundlesDir, repository, v1.ImageIndexFile)
+	indexBytes, err := os.ReadFile(indexPath)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	var index v1.Index
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(indexBytes, &index))
+
+	var digest string
+	for _, descriptor := range index.Manifests {
+		if descriptor.Annotations[v1.AnnotationRefName] == tag {
+			digest = descriptor.Digest.String()
+			break
+		}
+	}
+
+	require.NotEmpty(t, digest)
+
+	manifestPath := filepath.Join(bundlesDir, repository, "blobs", "sha256", digest[len("sha256:"):])
+	manifestBytes, err := os.ReadFile(manifestPath)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	var manifest map[string]any
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(manifestBytes, &manifest))
+	return manifest
+}
diff --git a/internal/config/manifest_version_load_test.go b/internal/config/manifest_version_load_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..7e4e52aa
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/config/manifest_version_load_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+package config
+
+import (
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+)
+
+func TestLoad_UnsupportedManifestVersionIsDeferred(t *testing.T) {
+	configPath := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "oci_invalid_manifest_version.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configPath, []byte(`storage:
+  type: oci
+  oci:
+    repository: some.target/repository/abundle:latest
+    bundles_directory: /tmp/bundles
+    authentication:
+      username: foo
+      password: bar
+    poll_interval: 5m
+    manifest_version: "1.2"
+`), 0o600))
+	result, err := Load(configPath)
+
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NotNil(t, result)
+	require.NotNil(t, result.Config)
+	require.NotNil(t, result.Config.Storage.OCI)
+	assert.Equal(t, "1.2", result.Config.Storage.OCI.ManifestVersion)
+}

diff --git a/internal/config/manifest_version_test.go b/internal/config/manifest_version_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..45d3ea0f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/config/manifest_version_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@
+package config
+
+import (
+	"encoding/json"
+	"fmt"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema/v5"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+)
+
+func TestJSONSchema_ManifestVersionType(t *testing.T) {
+	schema, err := jsonschema.Compile("../../config/flipt.schema.json")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	for _, manifestVersion := range []string{"oci-1.0", "oci-1.1", "1.2"} {
+		t.Run("string_"+manifestVersion, func(t *testing.T) {
+			var document any
+			require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal([]byte(fmt.Sprintf(`{
+				"storage": {
+					"type": "oci",
+					"oci": {
+						"repository": "some.target/repository/abundle:latest",
+						"manifest_version": %q
+					}
+				}
+			}`, manifestVersion)), &document))
+
+			err = schema.Validate(document)
+			require.NoError(t, err)
+		})
+	}
+
+	for idx, documentBytes := range [][]byte{
+		[]byte(`{
+			"storage": {
+				"type": "oci",
+				"oci": {
+					"repository": "some.target/repository/abundle:latest",
+					"manifest_version": 10
+				}
+			}
+		}`),
+		[]byte(`{
+			"storage": {
+				"type": "oci",
+				"oci": {
+					"repository": "some.target/repository/abundle:latest",
+					"manifest_version": true
+				}
+			}
+		}`),
+	} {
+		t.Run(fmt.Sprintf("non_string_%d", idx), func(t *testing.T) {
+			var document any
+			require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(documentBytes, &document))
+
+			err = schema.Validate(document)
+			require.Error(t, err)
+			assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "manifest_version")
+		})
+	}
+}
